title: MrCrayfish's Vehicle Unofficial
description: The iconic vehicle mod developed by MrCrayfish has been meticulously ported to Minecraft 1.20.1 by bay4lly. This unofficial version aims to provide a high-quality vehicle experience in modern versions.
body:
MrCrayfish's Vehicle Mod (Unofficial Port) – 1.20.1

This project is an unofficial port of the popular vehicle mod originally created by MrCrayfish, updated to work with Minecraft 1.20.1 using Forge.

This mod introduces a variety of high-quality, drivable vehicles into Minecraft, allowing players to explore their worlds faster and in a more immersive way.

---

🚗 Features

- Multiple vehicle types including cars, ATVs, and go-karts
- Smooth and realistic driving mechanics
- Fuel system support for added survival gameplay
- Multiplayer compatibility – race and explore with friends
- Optimized for Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge

---

🎮 Why download this mod?

If you enjoy exploration, racing, or simply want a more modern transportation system in Minecraft, this mod adds a fun and immersive vehicle experience to your world.

Whether you're driving across long roads, racing your friends, or building a custom garage, this mod enhances gameplay in a unique way.

---

⚠️ Important

This is an unofficial port. Please do not contact the original creator, MrCrayfish, for support regarding this version.

If you encounter bugs or issues, please report them via the Discord server.

---

🙌 Credits

- Original Mod: MrCrayfish
- Ported to 1.20.1: bay4lly

---

🔗 Links

- Discord Server: https://discord.gg/BzB3pSum8g
